description.overview: Cavaliers are the ideal companion dogs. They combine the gentleness of a toy breed with the athleticism of a spaniel. Sweet-natured and adaptable.
description.temperament: Cavaliers are affectionate and adaptable. They love everyone—people, dogs, even cats. They're equally happy on a lap or on a hike.
description.health: Prone to heart disease (mitral valve disease) and syringomyelia. Buy only from health-tested breeders. Regular cardiac screening important.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Adaptable to owner's lifestyle. Happy with walks or more active pursuits.

verdict.summary: The ideal companion dog—adaptable, affectionate, and gentle. Great for families, seniors, and apartments. Be aware of serious health issues in the breed and buy from health-tested breeders.
